result.name: Sorcerer’s skeleton key
result.description: Level: 1d6 + 2 Form: Wooden stick, iron wand, or piece of straw Effect: When tapped three times against any locked door or other object (of the cypher level or lower), the key automatically unlocks it.

sections.name: Sorcerer’s skeleton key
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6 + 2

Form: Wooden stick, iron wand, or piece of straw

Effect: When tapped three times against any locked door or other object (of the cypher level or lower), the key automatically unlocks it.
